channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [TVTODAY] Independent Director, Mr. Rajeev Gupta, Concludes Statutory Tenure at TV Today Network Ltd
item.description:
TV Today Network Ltd has announced the completion of statutory tenure for Mr. Rajeev Gupta as an Independent Director. His tenure concluded on March 04, 2026, after which he ceased to be a Non-Executive Independent Director and member of the Audit Committee. The company has expressed gratitude for his contributions.

  • Mr. Rajeev Gupta's statutory tenure as an Independent Director at TV Today Network Ltd has concluded.
  • His tenure ended on March 04, 2026, and he ceased to be a Non-Executive Independent Director and member of the Audit Committee from the close of business hours on the same day.
  • The company has expressed appreciation for Mr. Gupta's contributions during his tenure.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TV TODAY NETWORK LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SUPRAP] Supra Pacific Financial Services Ltd Schedules Board Meeting to Discuss Rights Issue
item.description:
Supra Pacific Financial Services Ltd has informed the BSE that a meeting of the Board of Directors is scheduled on 07/03/2026. The meeting will consider and approve various matters related to the Rights Issue of the company, including the terms and conditions, rights issue size, rights entitlement ratio, record date confirmation, and rights issue opening and closing date. The trading window for dealing in the securities of the company has been closed from Wednesday, March 04, 2026, and will remain closed till 48 hours from the outcome meeting for Directors, KMPs, Promoters and Promoters Group, Designated Persons and Connected Persons etc. covered under the Code. The company has informed all Directors/Connected Persons/Designated Persons not to trade in the securities of the company during the aforesaid period of closure of Trading Window.

  • Supra Pacific Financial Services Ltd scheduled a Board Meeting on 07/03/2026 to discuss various matters related to the Rights Issue.
  • The Rights Issue terms and conditions, size, entitlement ratio, record date confirmation, and opening and closing date will be considered and approved in the meeting.
  • The trading window for dealing in the securities of the company has been closed from Wednesday, March 04, 2026.
  • Directors, KMPs, Promoters and Promoters Group, Designated Persons and Connected Persons etc. covered under the Code are not allowed to trade in the securities of the company during the closure of the Trading Window.
  • The company will make disclosures as may be required under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, based on the outcome of the meeting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Supra Pacific Management Consultancy Ltd | Category: Right Issue

item.title: [SICAPIT] SI Capital to Consider Fundraising Through Various Borrowing Options on March 07, 2026
item.description:
SI Capital & Financial Services Ltd has announced a Board of Directors meeting on March 07, 2026. The agenda includes considering various options for raising funds through borrowings, such as issuing redeemable non-convertible debentures in the onshore/offshore market by way of private placement/preferential allotment. The decision will be based on prevailing market conditions.

  • SI Capital has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on March 07, 2026
  • The agenda includes considering various options for raising funds through borrowings
  • The fundraising may involve issuing redeemable non-convertible debentures in the onshore/offshore market
  • The consideration will be based on private placement/preferential allotment
  • The decision will be influenced by prevailing market conditions

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SI CAPITAL & FINANCIAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [TBZ] Tribhovandas Bhimji Zaveri Ltd's Head of Human Resources, Ms. Shikha Khurana, Resigns Effective March 4, 2026
item.description:
Tribhovandas Bhimji Zaveri Ltd (TBZ) announced the resignation of Ms. Shikha Khurana, the Head of Human Resources, effective March 4, 2026. Ms. Khurana has served the company since 2026 and has decided to pursue other career opportunities. The company has complied with the necessary regulations and has disclosed the required information as per the SEBI Master Circular No.: SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/CIR/P/0155 dated 11th November, 2024 and Regulation 30 of Listing Regulations.

  • Ms. Shikha Khurana, Head of Human Resources, resigns from Tribhovandas Bhimji Zaveri Ltd.
  • Ms. Khurana's resignation is effective from March 4, 2026.
  • Ms. Khurana has served the company since 2026.
  • Ms. Khurana is leaving to pursue other career opportunities.
  • TBZ has complied with the necessary regulations and disclosed the required information.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TRIBHOVANDAS BHIMJI ZAVERI LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ROBU] Macfos Ltd Schedules Board Meeting to Consider Bonus Equity Shares Allotment
item.description:
Macfos Ltd has informed the BSE that a Board of Directors meeting is scheduled on 11/03/2026. The agenda includes the consideration and approval of the allotment of bonus equity shares. This is in accordance with Regulation 29 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Macfos Ltd scheduled a Board of Directors meeting for 11/03/2026
  • The agenda includes the consideration and approval of bonus equity shares allotment

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Macfos Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [KFINTECH] KFin Technologies Ltd to Participate in Investor Non-Deal Roadshows in Hong Kong and Taiwan
item.description:
KFin Technologies Ltd has announced its participation in investor non-deal roadshows being organized by Elara Capital. The roadshows will take place in Hong Kong and Taiwan from March 1 to March 14, 2026. The company will make presentations on the same lines as the presentation made available on the websites of the Stock Exchanges and the Company on February 13, 2026. The schedule is subject to change due to exigencies.

  • KFin Technologies Ltd to participate in investor non-deal roadshows organized by Elara Capital
  • Roadshows to take place in Hong Kong and Taiwan from March 1 to March 14, 2026
  • Company to make presentations on the same lines as the presentation made available on the websites of the Stock Exchanges and the Company on February 13, 2026
  • Schedule subject to change due to exigencies

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KFin Technologies Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [NEOGEN] Neogen Chemicals Ltd. to Consider Preferential Issue of Equity Shares for Fund Raising
item.description:
Neogen Chemicals Ltd. has announced a Board meeting on 07/03/2026 to consider and approve the proposal for raising funds by way of a Preferential Issue of equity shares. The price and other terms and conditions will be determined pursuant to Chapter V of the SEBI ICDR Regulations and the Companies Act, 2013. The fund raising is subject to necessary approvals from members of the Company and other regulatory or statutory bodies. The Trading Window for dealing in the shares of the Company is closed for all designated persons and their immediate relatives, connected persons and legitimate insiders till 48 hours from the conclusion of the Board Meeting.

  • Neogen Chemicals Ltd. to consider Preferential Issue of equity shares for fund raising
  • Fund raising subject to necessary approvals from members of the Company and other regulatory or statutory bodies
  • Price and other terms and conditions to be determined pursuant to Chapter V of the SEBI ICDR Regulations and the Companies Act, 2013
  • Trading Window for dealing in the shares of the Company is closed for all designated persons and their immediate relatives, connected persons and legitimate insiders till 48 hours from the conclusion of the Board Meeting

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Neogen Chemicals Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [SMAUTO] Resignation of Company Secretary and Compliance Officer at SM Auto Stamping Ltd
item.description:
SM Auto Stamping Ltd has announced the resignation of its Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, Mr. Pawan Mahajan, with effect from the end of business hours on Thursday, 30th April, 2026. The company has received and accepted his resignation letter on 4th March, 2026. Mr. Mahajan is leaving to pursue an alternate career opportunity outside the organization. The company will file the necessary fillings/disclosures with the concerned authorities to give effect to this resignation.

  • Resignation of Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, Mr. Pawan Mahajan
  • Effective from the end of business hours on Thursday, 30th April, 2026
  • Leaving to pursue an alternate career opportunity outside the organization
  • Company has received and accepted the resignation letter on 4th March, 2026
  • Company will file the necessary fillings/disclosures with the concerned authorities

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SM Auto Stamping Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [SHREEREF] Shree Refrigerations Ltd. to Inaugurate New Facility in Satara on May 20, 2026
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Shree Refrigerations Ltd. has announced the inauguration of its new facility at Plot No. M N 537, Hanbarwadi, Satara - 415106 on 20th May 2026. This information is shared in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Shree Refrigerations Ltd. is inaugurating a new facility in Satara.
  • The new facility is located at Plot No. M N 537, Hanbarwadi, Satara - 415106.
  • The inauguration is scheduled for 20th May 2026.
  • This announcement is in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shree Refrigerations Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [DLF] Misleading Headline About DLF's Luxury Homes in Gurgaon; Supreme Court Orders CBI Probe
item.description:
The headline of the news article is misleading and sensationalized. The news item conflates facts and fails to accurately report the scope and context of ongoing legal proceedings. The project in question, 'The Primus', New Gurgaon, was developed by DLF Home Developers Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of DLF Ltd. The project has 624 apartments, and possession was provided with water, electricity, and requisite amenities at the time of offer of possession in 2017. The present matter arises out of consumer complaints filed by 5 allottees, which were adjudicated by the National Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission (NCDRC). The NCDRC passed the judgement dated 29th May 2023. The complainants and DHDL have filed appeal(s) in the Hon’ble Supreme Court against the order of the NCDRC. The Hon'ble Supreme Court has directed an inquiry to be conducted, giving full opportunity to both parties to place information and documents as required. The Hon'ble Supreme Court has expressly clarified that ‘no definitive opinion has been expressed by us against or in favour of any person/ authority in praesenti’. The matter is presently sub judice before the Hon'ble Supreme Court and as on date no final order has been passed by the Hon'ble Supreme Court which can be said to have any material impact on the business/ operation of the Company/ DHDL.

  • The headline of the news article is misleading and sensationalized
  • The news item conflates facts and fails to accurately report the scope and context of ongoing legal proceedings
  • The matter is presently sub judice before the Hon'ble Supreme Court and as on date no final order has been passed by the Hon'ble Supreme Court which can be said to have any material impact on the business/ operation of the Company/ DHDL
  • The share price decline is in line with the overall decline in all indices including Realty Index, coupled with current geo-political and war like disruptions which is affecting economies, stock exchanges, countries, companies globally and in India

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DLF LTD. | Category: Legal
